title: United States Application for Employment Authorization (Form I-765)
description: Request an Employment Authorization Document (EAD) from U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) using Form I-765: an initial grant, a renewal, or a replacement/correction of employment authorization, across the full set of published eligibility categories (e.g. asylee, F-1 student OPT, TPS, adjustment-of-status applicant). The eligibility category selected in Item Number 27 is the core routing field of the form: it determines which supporting-evidence rules and, for several categories, which additional sub-fields (Item Numbers 28-31) apply. It does not submit the application; the live U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the live Form I-765 PDF at uscis.gov (fetched directly, no access block; 7 pages extracted as clean text via pdfjs-dist and transcribed field-by-field). The eligibility-category enumeration (Item Number 27, validation.enum on the `eligibilityCategory` field) was cross-derived from the companion Form I-765 Instructions PDF (also fetched directly), specifically its 'Who May File Form I-765' section, since the form itself does not enumerate the categories on its face. Every one of the 53 categories listed there was transcribed to its literal USCIS code (e.g. '(a)(3)', '(c)(3)(A)') as the canonical enum value, matching the Instructions' own worked example ('type or print (a)(3)'). Item-number-to-field mapping for Part 2 (Items 8-31) was cross-checked against the Instructions' 'Specific Instructions' section (page 18-20), which restates every item number in order, resolving any ambiguity from the form PDF's non-linear text-extraction order. No unresolved discrepancies remain against the two live sources reviewed; status is set to verified on this first authoring pass. Scope exclusions (unnumbered attorney/G-28 identification block, Part 6 continuation page, documents[] evidence catalog) are recorded in VERIFICATION.md and do not affect the numbered-item field set.

fields.name: applicantFamilyName
fields.label: Your Full Legal Name — Family Name (Last Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: applicantGivenName
fields.label: Your Full Legal Name — Given Name (First Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: applicantMiddleName
fields.label: Your Full Legal Name — Middle Name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: reasonForApplying
fields.label: I am applying for (select only one box)
fields.description: The form reuses item numbers 1.a/1.b/1.c for this checkbox group, distinct from the identically-numbered Full Legal Name fields above. If 'renewal', attach a copy of the previous EAD. Replacement/correction NOT due to USCIS error only; a correction due to USCIS error does not require a new Form I-765 or fee.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Your U.S. Mailing Address — Street Number and Name
fields.description: USCIS will send the EAD to this address. Must be a U.S. address (residence, APO, commercial, or PO Box) — you must have a U.S. address to file this application.

fields.name: mailingAddressInCareOfName
fields.label: Your U.S. Mailing Address — In Care Of Name
fields.description: If applicable. If your mailing address is in a U.S. territory and contains an urbanization name, list the urbanization name here.

fields.name: mailingAddressApt
fields.label: Your U.S. Mailing Address — Apt./Flr./Ste.
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Your U.S. Mailing Address — City or Town

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Your U.S. Mailing Address — State

fields.name: mailingAddressZipCode
fields.label: Your U.S. Mailing Address — ZIP Code

fields.name: physicalAddressSameAsMailing
fields.label: Is your current mailing address the same as your physical address?
fields.description: If false, give the physicalAddress* fields (U.S. Physical Address).

fields.name: physicalAddressLine1
fields.label: U.S. Physical Address — Street Number and Name

fields.name: physicalAddressApt
fields.label: U.S. Physical Address — Apt./Flr./Ste.
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: physicalAddressCity
fields.label: U.S. Physical Address — City or Town

fields.name: physicalAddressState
fields.label: U.S. Physical Address — State

fields.label: U.S. Physical Address — ZIP Code

fields.name: alienRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Alien Registration Number (A-Number) (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Digits only (the form prefixes a printed "A-"); leave as N/A if none has been assigned.

fields.name: uscisOnlineAccountNumber
fields.label: USCIS Online Account Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Present only if you previously filed a form online with a receipt number beginning "IOE"; not the same as an A-Number.

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. As shown on your birth certificate or secondary evidence provided to USCIS.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital Status
fields.description: The marital status you have on the date you file Form I-765.

fields.name: previouslyFiledForEmploymentAuthorization
fields.label: Have you previously filed Form I-765?

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Your Social Security Number (SSN) (if known)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: citizenshipCountry1
fields.label: Country or Countries of Citizenship or Nationality — Country 1
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Not necessarily the country where you were born. If stateless, use "stateless" and explain elsewhere on the application.

fields.name: citizenshipCountry2
fields.label: Country or Countries of Citizenship or Nationality — Country 2
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Only if you hold citizenship/nationality in a second country.

fields.name: placeOfBirthCity
fields.label: Place of Birth — City/Town/Village
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: placeOfBirthStateOrProvince
fields.label: Place of Birth — State/Province
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Leave blank if the country of birth has no equivalent subdivision.

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Place of Birth — Country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Use the country name as it was at the time of birth, even if it has since changed or no longer exists.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: i94Number
fields.label: Form I-94 Arrival-Departure Record Number (if any)
fields.description: Also known as the Departure Number on some versions of Form I-94.

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: Passport Number of Your Most Recently Issued Passport
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Enter even if the passport or travel document is currently expired.

fields.name: travelDocumentNumber
fields.label: Travel Document Number (if any)

fields.name: passportOrTravelDocumentIssuingCountry
fields.label: Country That Issued Your Passport or Travel Document

fields.name: passportOrTravelDocumentExpirationDate
fields.label: Expiration Date for Passport or Travel Document
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: dateOfLastArrival
fields.label: Date of Your Last Arrival Into the United States, On or About
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: placeOfLastArrival
fields.label: Place of Your Last Arrival Into the United States

fields.name: immigrationStatusAtLastArrival
fields.label: Immigration Status at Your Last Arrival
fields.description: For example, "B-2 visitor", "F-1 student", or "no status".

fields.name: currentImmigrationStatusOrCategory
fields.label: Your Current Immigration Status or Category
fields.description: For example, "B-2 visitor", "F-1 student", "parolee", "deferred action", or "no status or category".

fields.name: sevisNumber
fields.label: Student and Exchange Visitor Information System (SEVIS) Number (if any)

fields.name: eligibilityCategory
fields.label: Eligibility Category
fields.description: The core routing field of the form. Enter only one category. Values are the literal USCIS eligibility-category codes (matching the Instructions' own worked examples, e.g. "(a)(8)", "(c)(17)(iii)"), sourced from the Form I-765 Instructions 'Who May File Form I-765' section (the form itself does not enumerate categories, only cross-references the Instructions). Category key: (a)(2) Legalization temporary resident (INA 245A/210); (a)(3) Refugee; (a)(4) Paroled as a refugee; (a)(5) Asylee (granted asylum); (a)(6) K-1 fiancé(e) of U.S. citizen or K-2 dependent; (a)(7) N-8 or N-9 nonimmigrant; (a)(8) Citizen of Micronesia, the Marshall Islands, or Palau; (a)(9) K-3 spouse of U.S. citizen or K-4 dependent; (a)(10) Granted withholding of deportation or removal; (a)(11) Deferred Enforced Departure (DED); (a)(12) TPS approved; (a)(13) Family Unity Program (IMMACT 90); (a)(14) LIFE Act Family Unity; (a)(15) V-1/V-2/V-3 nonimmigrant; (a)(16) T-1 nonimmigrant; (a)(17) Spouse of E-1/E-2 treaty trader/investor or E-3 Australian specialty occupation professional; (a)(18) Spouse of an L-1 intracompany transferee; (a)(19) U-1 nonimmigrant; (a)(20) U-2/U-3/U-4/U-5 nonimmigrant; (c)(1) Dependent of A-1 or A-2 foreign government official; (c)(2) Dependent of TECRO E-1 nonimmigrant; (c)(3)(A) F-1 student, pre-completion OPT; (c)(3)(B) F-1 student, post-completion OPT; (c)(3)(C) F-1 student, 24-month STEM OPT extension; (c)(3)(ii) F-1 student, off-campus employment sponsored by a qualifying international organization; (c)(3)(iii) F-1 student, off-campus employment due to severe economic hardship; (c)(4) Dependent of G-1/G-3/G-4 nonimmigrant; (c)(5) J-2 spouse or minor child of an exchange visitor; (c)(6) M-1 student, post-completion OPT; (c)(7) Dependent of NATO-1 through NATO-6; (c)(8) Pending asylum and/or withholding of removal applicant, incl. ABC Settlement Agreement; (c)(9) Adjustment of status applicant under INA section 245, incl. T/U adjustment and National Interest Waiver physician renewal; (c)(10) Applicant for suspension of deportation or cancellation of removal; (c)(11) Parole; (c)(12) Spouse of an E-2 CNMI investor; (c)(14) Deferred action, incl. A-3/G-5 nonimmigrant with a pending civil action; (c)(16) Registry applicant (continuous residence since January 1, 1972); (c)(17)(i) B-1 nonimmigrant personal/domestic servant of a nonimmigrant employer; (c)(17)(ii) B-1 nonimmigrant domestic servant of a U.S. citizen; (c)(17)(iii) B-1 nonimmigrant employed by a foreign airline; (c)(18) Final order of deportation/removal, incl. deferral of removal under the Convention Against Torture; (c)(19) TPS pending, prima facie eligible; (c)(20) Applicant for legalization under INA section 210; (c)(22) Applicant for legalization under INA section 245A; (c)(24) LIFE Legalization applicant; (c)(25) T-2/T-3/T-4/T-5/T-6 nonimmigrant; (c)(26) Spouse of an H-1B nonimmigrant; (c)(31) VAWA self-petitioner; (c)(33) Consideration of Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA); (c)(35) Principal beneficiary of an approved employment-based immigrant petition facing compelling circumstances; (c)(36) Spouse or unmarried child of a (c)(35) principal beneficiary; (c)(37) Applicant for CNMI long-term resident status; (c)(40) Bona fide determination for T nonimmigrant status principal applicants and eligible family members.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-765 Part 2, item 27; category definitions from Form I-765 Instructions, "Who May File Form I-765"

fields.name: stemOptDegreeLevelAndMajor
fields.label: (c)(3)(C) STEM OPT Eligibility Category — Degree Level and Major
fields.description: For example, "Bachelor's degree in English".

fields.name: stemOptEmployerNameInEVerify
fields.label: (c)(3)(C) STEM OPT Eligibility Category — Employer's Name as Listed in E-Verify

fields.name: stemOptEmployerEVerifyCompanyId
fields.label: (c)(3)(C) STEM OPT Eligibility Category — Employer's E-Verify Company Identification Number
fields.description: The employer's E-Verify Company Identification Number, or a valid E-Verify Client Company Identification Number.

fields.name: c26SpouseFormI797ReceiptNumber
fields.label: (c)(26) Eligibility Category — Receipt Number of Spouse's Most Recent Form I-797 Notice for Form I-129

fields.name: everArrestedOrConvictedC8
fields.label: (c)(8) Eligibility Category — Have you EVER been arrested for and/or convicted of any crime?
fields.description: If true, refer to Special Filing Instructions for Those With Pending Asylum Applications (c)(8) in the Form I-765 Instructions for information about providing court dispositions.

fields.name: c35c36FormI140ReceiptNumber
fields.label: (c)(35) and (c)(36) Eligibility Category — Receipt Number of Form I-797 Notice for Form I-140
fields.description: Your own Form I-140 receipt number if applying under (c)(35), or your spouse's/parent's Form I-140 receipt number if applying under (c)(36).

fields.name: everArrestedOrConvictedC35C36
fields.label: (c)(35) and (c)(36) Eligibility Category — Have you EVER been arrested for and/or convicted of any crime?
fields.description: If true, refer to Employment-Based Nonimmigrant Categories, Items 8-9 in the Form I-765 Instructions for information about providing court dispositions.

fields.name: applicantCanReadEnglish
fields.label: I can read and understand English, and I have read and understand every question and instruction on this application and my answer to every question
fields.description: Mutually exclusive with usedInterpreter — select the box for exactly one of the two.

fields.name: usedInterpreter
fields.label: The interpreter named in Part 4 read to me every question and instruction on this application and my answer to every question in a language in which I am fluent, and I understood everything
fields.description: Mutually exclusive with applicantCanReadEnglish. If true, complete the interpreter* fields.

fields.name: usedPreparer
fields.label: At my request, the preparer named in Part 5 prepared this application for me based only upon information I provided or authorized
fields.description: If true, complete the preparer* fields.

fields.name: applicantDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's Daytime Telephone Number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantEmail
fields.label: Applicant's Email Address (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: abcSettlementClassMember
fields.label: Select this box if you are a Salvadoran or Guatemalan national eligible for benefits under the ABC settlement agreement
fields.description: Relevant when eligibilityCategory is '(c)(8)'; identifying as an ABC class member with a complete pending asylum application entitles a decision within 60 days.

fields.name: applicantSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Applicant's Signature
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. By signing, the applicant certifies under penalty of perjury that all information provided is complete, true, and correct, and acknowledges the required biometrics appointment.

fields.label: I am an attorney or accredited representative and my representation of the applicant in this case extends/does not extend beyond the preparation of this application
fields.description: If true, also give preparerRepresentationExtendsBeyondPreparation. If false, the box certifies the preparer is not an attorney or accredited representative. If the representation extends beyond preparing this application, Form G-28 may also be required (out of scope here).
